name: Detroit Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Detroit Jewelry & Loan is a pawn shop located in Hamtramck, MI offering collateral-based loans and jewelry/precious metals buying services.
description_long:
Detroit Jewelry & Loan operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 9716 Joseph Campau Ave in Hamtramck, Michigan. The business has established itself in the local community as a source for quick cash through collateral-based lending. Based on the available information, the company functions within the pawn shop category, which typically involves accepting personal items of value as collateral for short-term loans.

The company offers services typical of pawn operations, including collateral-based lending where customers can leverage items of value to obtain cash quickly. As indicated by the business name emphasizing jewelry, the shop likely specializes in jewelry buying and loan services. The business maintains regular operating hours throughout the week, suggesting consistent availability to serve local customers seeking immediate liquidity.

The company distinguishes itself through its location in Hamtramck's commercial corridor on Joseph Campau Avenue, a traditionally mixed-use retail district. Operating six days per week with evening hours until 6:30 PM on weekdays provides accessibility for working customers. The direct phone line (313) 870-9902 suggests a traditional customer service model with direct personal contact available.

Pawn shops serve an important niche in consumer finance for individuals needing immediate cash without credit checks or lengthy approval processes. However, customers should understand that pawn loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional lending and require surrendering physical collateral. The specific terms, interest rates, redemption periods, and loan-to-value ratios are not disclosed in available information, which is a significant limitation for consumer evaluation.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Located on Joseph Campau Ave in accessible Hamtramck commercial district
Extended business hours until 6:30 PM weekdays accommodate working customers
Open six days per week for accessibility
Direct phone line (313) 870-9902 available for customer inquiries
No credit check required typical of pawn operations
Immediate cash access without lengthy approval processes
Jewelry specialization indicated by business name suggests expertise in precious metals evaluation
cons: No website with service details, rates, or loan terms publicly available—only Waze listing
Pawn loans typically carry significantly higher interest rates than traditional lenders
Requires surrendering physical collateral with risk of loss if loan not repaid
No information disclosed about loan-to-value ratios, redemption periods, or fee structures
Limited online presence prevents transparent comparison shopping for rates and terms
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash without credit approval
Individuals with valuable jewelry or precious metals to pledge as collateral
People seeking quick loans with minimal documentation requirements
diagnosis: Detroit Jewelry & Loan is best for customers in the Hamtramck area who need immediate cash and have valuable jewelry or collateral but lack access to traditional credit. The primary caveat is the complete lack of published information about interest rates, fees, redemption terms, and loan-to-value ratios—essential details consumers need before pledging collateral. Prospective customers must call directly to obtain transparent pricing.
services: Collateral-based loans using personal items as security
Jewelry appraisal services (inferred from business name and category)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
